summary: Top‑notch SBD capture of a mellow 1995 show packed with new material, clean bright sound and solid performances.
review: The recording is praised as an excellent post‑fade soundboard source with superb separation, dynamic range and only occasional static on “Foolish Heart.” The concert itself is described as a professional, relaxed set that showcases the band’s developing 1995 repertoire and features particularly tasteful keyboard work. While one reviewer prefers other versions, the consensus highlights the overall quality of both music and audio.

ai_rating.rationale: One detailed, highly positive review balances two shorter, less enthusiastic comments; the show is regarded as solid with a standout SBD recording, leading to an overall rating in the good‑to‑great range.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Post‑fade board tape with clean, bright sound and excellent separation; occasional static hit on “Foolish Heart”; includes a cassette generation copy but overall considered top‑notch for SBD.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Mellow, slow‑paced performance that lets songs breathe; showcases many new 1995 compositions and a relaxed, professional vibe.

band_member_comments.Keys: Vince’s keyboard work adds a comforting feel and is highlighted as a key element of the show.
band_member_comments.Drums: Incredible drum sound noted; drums are especially praised for their impact.
